runtime.browserHarness: Chromium CDP attached to packaged Electron

selectedPreset.name: 专业语气
selectedPreset.promptTemplate: Rewrite the user input in a {{tone}} professional tone for {{audience}}. Preserve its meaning and return only the rewritten text.

promptPreview.resolved: Rewrite the user input in a clear and concise professional tone for workplace readers. Preserve its meaning and return only the rewritten text.

dynamicFeature.resultDescription: 将文本改写为清晰、克制的职场表达。

fixesValidatedByCapture: A missing ai-commands.json is initialized as an editable empty registry instead of an invalid config.
Prompt-variable byte validation does not depend on Buffer inside the plugin VM sandbox.
Active feature items remain writable when the plugin root-search provider is disabled, while root-scoped boxItems remain gated.
Dynamically registered feature file icons resolve through the packaged plugin root before search rendering.
Starter presets create editable drafts and the System Prompt preview resolves every declared variable deterministically.
A saved custom command appears immediately as a CoreBox dynamic feature.
A dynamic custom command reuses the packaged intelligence-ask renderer and opens its no-history AI Command widget.

scope.closes: Current-version packaged evidence for starter presets, deterministic prompt preview, save, dynamic CoreBox registration, and shared-renderer widget activation.
scope.doesNotClose: The 13-surface global --requireCurrentVersion gate or a real provider invocation.
